title: Ending Aging: The Rejuvenation Breakthroughs That Could Reverse Human Aging in Our Lifetime

description.en: Aubrey de Grey and Michael Rae's 2007 St. Martin's Press work articulating the SENS (Strategies for Engineered Negligible Senescence) framework — the principal early systematic engineering proposal for comprehensive rejuvenation. The corpus engages it as part of the longevity-research trajectory demonstrating that radical lifespan extension is not biologically impossible.
